uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds standard-report input; expected value produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (Temperature = 21.37) and mapping to air.temperature. Payload 110A04020000290859: signed16 centi-degC 0x0859=2137 /100.

Synthetic in-bounds standard-report input; expected value produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (Humidity = 48.29) and mapping to air.relativeHumidity. Payload 110A0405000021 12DD: unsigned16 centi-% 0x12DD=4829 /100.

uplink.description: standard report: CO2 concentration 612 ppm (cluster 0x800C, endpoint 1)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds standard-report input; expected value produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (label CO2 = 612) and mapping to air.co2 (ppm). Frame-control byte 0x31 yields ZCL endpoint 1, so the shared 0x800C cluster is the CO2 channel. Payload 310A800C0000290264.

uplink.description: standard report: VOC concentration 400 (cluster 0x800C, endpoint 0 -> extra)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds standard-report input; expected value produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (label VOC = 400). Frame-control byte 0x11 yields ZCL endpoint 0, so the shared 0x800C cluster is the VOC channel. The vocabulary models only air.co2, so VOC is the camelCase extra `voc` (raw, per air-quality category notes). Payload 110A800C0000290190.

uplink.description: standard report: disposable battery 3.642 V (cluster 0x0050 attr 6)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds standard-report input; expected value produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (label BatteryVoltage = 3.642) and mapping to battery (V). Flags byte 0x04 selects the disposable-battery 2-byte mV source (0x0E3A=3642 mV /1000). Payload 110A0050000641050304 0E3A.

uplink.description: proprietary Huffman batch frame is out of scope -> error
uplink._note: Synthetic batch-style frame (frame-control byte 0x20, bit0 clear). Upstream would route this to brUncompress; our codec rejects batch frames as out of scope.
